name: Ana
text: You were talking to the fisherman for a while.

name: You
text: He had a lot to say.

name: Ana
text: He always does. Just like his grandfather.

name: Ana
text: There's something I've been trying to find.

name: Ana
text: A photograph. Old one. All twelve of us, the day we finished the first house.

name: Ana
text: I don't know where it ended up.

name: Ana
text: If you find it... bring it to me.
